languages.text: "Господин, меровцы первыми открыли огонь, приняв нас за врага".
"My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."
languages.original_text: "Господин, меровцы первыми открыли огонь, приняв нас за врага".

traits.locale_text: "My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."
"My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."
"My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."

languages.text: “大人，梅罗夫人误将我们当作敌人，是他们先开的火。”
languages.original_text: "My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."

traits.locale_text: “大人，梅罗夫人误将我们当作敌人，是他们先开的火。”

languages.text: « Les Meroviens nous ont confondus avec l'ennemi et ont été les premiers à ouvrir le feu, mon seigneur. »
languages.original_text: "My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."

traits.locale_text: « Les Meroviens nous ont confondus avec l'ennemi et ont été les premiers à ouvrir le feu, mon seigneur. »

languages.text: "Lordum, Merovlular bizi düşman sandı. İlk ateşi açanlar onlardı."
languages.original_text: "My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."

traits.locale_text: "Lordum, Merovlular bizi düşman sandı. İlk ateşi açanlar onlardı."

languages.text: «Mi señor, los merovianos nos confundieron con el enemigo y fueron los primeros en disparar».
languages.original_text: "My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."

traits.locale_text: «Mi señor, los merovianos nos confundieron con el enemigo y fueron los primeros en disparar».

languages.text: "Mylord, die Merovianer hielten uns für den Feind und haben das Feuer eröffnet."
languages.original_text: "My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."

traits.locale_text: "Mylord, die Merovianer hielten uns für den Feind und haben das Feuer eröffnet."

languages.text: 「お館様、メロヴィング朝は我々を敵と誤認し、先制攻撃を仕掛けました」
languages.original_text: "My lord, the Merovians mistook us for the enemy and were the first to open fire."

traits.locale_text: 「お館様、メロヴィング朝は我々を敵と誤認し、先制攻撃を仕掛けました」
